my_actions: Coordinate with Matthew Carter and finance team on Radar Mexico collection strategy
Determine Aptum's financial exposure and liability for the $200K+ AWS charges
Decide on escalation path and whether legal involvement is needed
Respond to thread with Aptum's position and next steps

Rick Marshbanks coordinating Ingram Micro support

Matthew and I will coordinate internally with our finance and legal teams today to determine our collection strategy and liability exposure. We'll follow up with you and Ilse by end of week with our position and proposed next steps. Can you confirm what Ingram's standard process is for disputed charges of this magnitude?
